subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down from the presence of the Desired One unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, that the wine of utterance may intoxicate him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل من لدی المقصود الی الذی آمن بالله رب العالمین لیاخذه سکر خمر البیان
